_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with Treatment given
Clinical Photograph of the stoma created

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure
Was the CT / MRI report submitted?
Does the imagining report show any presence of obstruction or indication for surgery?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers submitted?
Was the Detailed Procedure/Operative notes submitted?
Did the clinical photograph show evidence of stoma creation?
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: Imaging report does not show any presence of obstruction or indication for surgery.
Clinical notes missing detailed history, signs & symptoms, or indication for procedure.
CT / MRI report not submitted during pre-authorization.
Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment given not submitted during claim processing.
Detailed Operative / Procedure notes not submitted during claim processing.
Clinical photograph of the stoma creation not submitted or does not show evidence of stoma creation.
Detailed discharge summary not submitted during claim processing.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Tertiary care and Laparoscopic surgery facility availability
clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Ureterostomy/ Uretero-ureterostomy only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation
